thing-type.label: Notifications for Android TV Display Connection
thing-type.description: Notifications for Android TV is a Google Play store app by Christian Fees. Use this thing for each of your TV's that have this app installed and setup correctly.

parameter.name: address
parameter.label: Address
parameter.description: Enter just the IP or Hostname without the port or http/s

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: This port will be used for sending messages to your TV.

thing-type.label: Tv Overlay Display Connection
thing-type.description: TvOverlay is a Google Play store app by Tab Developer. Add one of these for each TV that is running the correctly setup and working app.

parameter.name: address
parameter.label: Address
parameter.description: Enter just the IP or Hostname without the port or http/s

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: This port will be used for sending messages to your TV.

channel-type.label: Last Message Text
channel-type.description: Contains the latest message text as a string

channel-type.label: Last Message URL
channel-type.description: Contains the URL of the latest message

channel-type.label: Last Message Date
channel-type.description: Contains the latest message date as a DateTime

channel-type.label: Last Message Name
channel-type.description: Contains the latest message senders name as a string

channel-type.label: Last Message Username
channel-type.description: Contains the latest message senders username as a string

channel-type.label: Chat Id
channel-type.description: Contains the id of chat from where the message was received.
